summary.intent: Push a branch and create a PR, then handle cleanup of symlinks created by the ./setup script.
summary.outcome: Added .gitignore entries for .claude/skills/ symlinks and amended the commit before pushing.

repo: Running ./setup creates relative symlinks in .claude/skills/ (e.g., gstack/browse) that should not be committed — they are recreated locally by setup for each teammate.
The project uses a gstack-based workflow with a ./setup script for local environment initialization.

code.finding: .claude/skills/ symlinks added to .gitignore to prevent committing setup-generated local symlinks

workflow: Symlinks created by setup scripts should be gitignored even if they are relative paths, since committing them conflicts with what setup does on first run.
Amending commits was used to fold in .gitignore changes before pushing.

friction: Symlinks from ./setup were not gitignored initially, requiring a post-hoc .gitignore update and commit amend before the PR could be finalized.
